reading.title: Reading: At a small restaurant
reading.passage: Do you have any pasta? Yes, we have some pasta and some pizza. There isn't any seafood today. Can I have some dessert, please? We have some cake and some fruit.

questions.question: There is seafood on the menu today.
What desserts are available?
questions.explanation: "We have some cake and some fruit."

reading.title: Reading: Weekly shopping
reading.passage: We need a lot of vegetables this week. There is plenty of fruit at the market today. I only have a few onions at home. This fresh fruit looks a little expensive, but there is a discount on organic food.

questions.question: There is a discount on organic food.
questions.explanation: "there is a discount on organic food."

questions.question: The writer has a lot of onions at home.
questions.explanation: "I only have a few onions at home."
